personal.name: Sarthak Routray
personal.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer & AI/ML Enthusiast
personal.summary: Full-stack software engineer with 2+ years of experience building production-grade web applications and AI-powered systems. Specializing in React/Next.js frontends, Python/FastAPI backends, and end-to-end ML pipelines. Passionate about creating delightful user experiences backed by robust, scalable infrastructure. Currently open to full-time SDE roles and exciting freelance projects.

achievements: Built a real-time log anomaly detection system using Python and LSTM networks, reducing incident response time by 40%
Developed a FastAPI microservice handling 5,000+ requests/day with sub-100ms P99 latency
Migrated legacy REST endpoints to async FastAPI, improving throughput by 3x
Implemented JWT authentication and RBAC for a multi-tenant SaaS dashboard
Containerized services with Docker and set up CI/CD via GitHub Actions
Delivered 8+ client projects including e-commerce platforms, portfolio websites, and internal tools
Built a SaaS MVP for a startup that onboarded 200+ users in the first month post-launch
Integrated payment gateways (Stripe, Razorpay) and automated billing workflows
Reduced client's page load time from 4.2s to 0.9s using Next.js ISR and image optimization
Managed projects end-to-end: requirements gathering, design, development, deployment

projects.name: SentinelAI — Log Anomaly Detection System
projects.description: A production-grade AI-powered log monitoring system that ingests server logs in real-time, detects anomalies using LSTM networks, and alerts via a Next.js admin dashboard.
highlights: Processes 10,000+ log events/minute with <5ms ingestion latency
Custom LSTM model achieving 94% anomaly detection accuracy on test data
Admin dashboard with real-time WebSocket updates and interactive log explorer
Full Dockerized deployment with Nginx reverse proxy and SSL termination
Implemented custom authentication with JWT and bcrypt-hashed admin credentials

projects.name: FinWise AI — Bank Statement Analyzer
projects.description: An intelligent bank statement parser and financial insights engine supporting PDF, CSV, XLSX, and image inputs with automatic format detection.
highlights: Auto-detects and handles 6 file formats (PDF, CSV, XLS/XLSX, HTML, images, plain text)
Parses European and Indian number formats, parenthesized negatives, and multi-line descriptions
Generates categorized spending reports with interactive charts
Confidence scoring and parse report for each transaction
Handles edge cases: merged cells, header detection, encoding mismatches

projects.name: Portfolio RAG Chatbot
projects.description: This very portfolio backend — a serverless RAG system on Modal.com enabling visitors to query my resume conversationally using ChromaDB + sentence-transformers + Groq LLaMA.
highlights: True serverless deployment on Modal.com with scale-to-zero and $1.20/month cost
Section-aware resume chunking with cosine similarity retrieval (k=5)
SSE streaming for real-time response display
In-memory rate limiting via Modal Dict (no Redis needed)
Embedding model baked into container image — cold starts under 5 seconds

projects.name: Cinematic Portfolio Website
projects.description: A visually stunning personal portfolio built with Next.js 15, featuring cinematic animations, dark mode, and a conversational AI assistant.
highlights: Lighthouse score 95+ across all metrics
Cinematic scroll animations using Framer Motion and custom intersection observers
Dark/light mode with system preference detection
Integrated RAG chatbot for conversational resume queries
Fully responsive — optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop

achievements: Relevant coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, DBMS, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, Machine Learning
Technical Secretary of the Computer Science Club (2023-2024)
Organized 3 campus hackathons with 200+ participants each

open_source.contributions: Contributed 2 bug fixes to the ChromaDB integration and improved the retrieval documentation with working examples
Submitted a PR improving async generator streaming documentation with SSE examples
